name: Hearty Pasta and Red Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked/canned red beans OR 2 cups kidney beans
1/2 teaspoon chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta al dente and rinse with cool water.
2. Drain the pasta well and transfer it to a mixing bowl.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly.
4. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
